touches.ai_summary: Inbound inquiry from Diego Clark (VP of CS) expressing interest in improving rep productivity. Discussed current workflow challenges and scheduled discovery call.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform help us track and automate follow-ups for our account managers?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, our automations suite is designed specifically for that use case. Let's schedule time to explore your current process.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming discovery call scheduled for next week. Diego confirmed availability and mentioned involving implementation lead.

questions_asked.question: Should we include our Implementation Lead in the discovery call?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, that would be valuable to understand technical requirements.

touches.ai_summary: Post-discovery follow-up. Diego confirmed interest in automations_plus_consulting package. Discussed team size (9 seats) and use case fit. Mateo raised questions about integration requirements.

questions_asked.question: How does the consulting component work with the automations package?
questions_asked.answer: You get dedicated onboarding support and monthly strategy sessions to optimize your workflows.

questions_asked.question: What integrations are available with our current CRM?
questions_asked.answer: We support all major CRMs. I'll send over our integration guide and we can review specifics on the next call.

touches.ai_summary: Proposal sent for $10,000 ACV (9 seats, automations_plus_consulting). Diego responded positively but mentioned budget constraints and requested pricing flexibility. Luke Young (Account Manager) now involved for technical evaluation.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on pricing? Our budget is tighter than expected this quarter.
questions_asked.answer: Let me work with my team on what we can do. Can you share your target budget range?

touches.ai_summary: Pricing negotiation call with Diego. Discussed budget constraints in detail. Agreed to revised pricing at $6,900 ACV (31% discount) to fit their Q2 budget. Diego committed to moving forward pending final internal approval from procurement (Mateo). No executive sponsor mentioned despite deal size.

questions_asked.question: If we sign before end of quarter, can you hold this pricing for our renewal?
questions_asked.answer: We can lock in the rate for year one, but renewals are typically at standard pricing. Let me check if we can extend that commitment.

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to sign off on this internally?
questions_asked.answer: Just Mateo from procurement to finalize paperwork. I have budget authority for this range.

objections: Initial pricing ($10K) exceeds allocated Q2 budget
next_steps: Diego to coordinate with Mateo for contract review
Target close by end of week
